div.head: The Secretary of State to the Consul General at Hankow (Josselyn)
div.p: Your September 18, noon, paragraph 5. The suggestion which you made to representatives of several mission societies is in substantial accord with instructions issued by a number of mission boards to their organizations in China in response to the Department’s letters to the International Missionary Council and the National Catholic Welfare Conference, copies of which were sent by those organizations respectively to all Protestant Mission Boards and to all Catholic religious communities in the United States having workers in China.
